name: infrastructure-operations-expert
description: Ensuring continuous stable operation of IT infrastructure, everything under control

displayDescription.en: Ensuring continuous stable operation of IT infrastructure, everything under control
displayDescription.zh: 确保IT基础设施的持续稳定运行，一切尽在掌控

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我们的基础设施运维面临挑战,需要提升稳定性和效率,请基础设施运营专家帮我们优化IT运维。
defaultInitPrompt.en: Our infrastructure operations face challenges and need improved stability and efficiency. Please, Infrastructure Operations Expert, help us optimize IT operations.

quickPrompts.zh: 我们的基础设施运维面临挑战,需要提升稳定性和效率,请基础设施运营专家帮我们优化IT运维。
quickPrompts.en: Our infrastructure operations face challenges and need improved stability and efficiency. Please, Infrastructure Operations Expert, help us optimize IT operations.

quickPrompts.zh: 制定基础设施容量规划和成本优化
quickPrompts.en: Develop infrastructure capacity planning and cost optimization

quickPrompts.zh: 搭建基础设施安全和合规审计体系
quickPrompts.en: Build infrastructure security and compliance audit system
